channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 16 May: Harare mainly clear · high 24° / low 14°
item.description: Harare: high 24°, low 14° (mainly clear) · Bulawayo: high 23°, low 13° (overcast) · Mutare: high 22°, low 15° (overcast) · Gweru: high 24°, low 13° (clear sky) · Masvingo: high 24°, low 14° (overcast) · Victoria Falls: high 29°, low 16° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Chirere chigokurerawo. (Raise a child and it will raise you too.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
